description: Filterbaby Pro Series Shower Filter, Doctor Developed, All-Metal Titanium Aluminum, Lab Tested to Reduce up to 99% of Chlorine, Chloramine & lead,Certain Heavy Metals, Great Water Pressure, Long Lasting, Chrome
feature_bullets: Healthier Skin & Hair in Weeks – Lab certified to reduce up to 99.9% of chlorine, chloramine, certain heavy metals, and 60+ other tap water contaminants. Users report softer skin, stronger and shinier hair, and less dryness within 2 weeks.
Consumer Tested Experience – In a study of 115 users, participants reported stronger hair with less shedding, improved shine, and better texture. Designed to support a healthier shower routine.

Advanced Multi-Stage Filtration – Premium carbon + KDF filter targets over 60 contaminants found in tap water, helping protect skin, scalp & hair from dryness, irritation, and long-term water exposure.

Premium All-Metal Build – Durable titanium-aluminum chrome housing is heat-resistant and microplastic-free (no leaching like plastic filters). Each refill lasts up to 3 months and uses up to 80% less plastic than typical shower filters, delivering sustainable performance with consistent water quality.

Doctor-Developed & Easy to Install – Co-developed with Beverly Hills hair restoration surgeon Dr. Robert Dorfman. Lightweight, leak-proof design installs in minutes and fits most standard showerheads.
feature_bullets_flat: Doctor-Developed & Easy to Install – Co-developed with Beverly Hills hair restoration surgeon Dr. Robert Dorfman. top_reviews.title: Disappointing
top_reviews.body: This filter did nothing at all. The 60 AED one was better

date.raw: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on 21 February 2026

top_reviews.title: Game Changer for Dry Skin & KP
top_reviews.body: I noticed a difference in my hair and skin within just a few showers! My hair and skin feel softer and less dry, and my keratosis pilaris is less inflamed. Installation was super simple; it took me no more than 10 minutes. I was surprised to find that my water pressure wasn't reduced at all, which was a major concern for me. The all-metal design looks sleek, high-quality, and durable, and I love that this product filters out chlorine and other contaminants from my water.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 20 February 2026

top_reviews.title: I refuse to shower without my filter!!
top_reviews.body: This is probably the best filter quality out there. For context, I have had eczema most of my life, and sometimes water can just make it worse, not to mention hot water. My skin is usually very dry when I wake up and flaky, but with Filterbaby I have no complaints.I woke up with clear, effortless skin. I have no more flaky, red, or inflamed skin. Mind you, I hate using ointments on my skin because I do not like the feeling. Filterbaby helps me calm my skin without relying on topicals. My blackheads are even subsiding.The little manual is super helpful (the best part is the pictures showing the action). I did not think it would be that easy to install, but it took only 10 minutes, and my shower feels more luxurious already. I did not need to call anyone for help it is very beginner friendly. Not to mention that there is no leakage at all. The filter is very strong and heavy duty, so even with the shower hose swinging below, the filter still held it up. I like that I did not have to get out a toolbox to install this filter. Everything I needed came in the box.I love the way the gold filter looks in my shower. There are a lot of small accents of gold, so it makes it look even more beautiful. I have been recommending this product to all my friends and family left and right. For the value, you get a truly extraordinary filter for an extraordinary price. It is easily one of the most functional products I have had for my bathroom and is 1000% worth the purchase.I will be purchasing this as gifts because this is one of the best things. It truly has changed my life and my skin.Please do yourself a favor and get this filter. Your mind, heart, and body will thank you!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 11 February 2026

top_reviews.title: Noticeable Improvement
top_reviews.body: I noticed a visible difference in my hair and skin within my first few showers! My skin and hair much more hydrated and I have noticed less breakage and brittleness at the ends. I also have noticed my skin feels less sensitive and my acne has stopped flaring up as much. The chrome design looks nice and feels high-quality and durable, and I love that this product filters out contaminants from my water. The installation was also super simple; it took me no more than 15 minutes, and was super easy to figure out.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 25 February 2026

top_reviews.title: Great shower filter!
top_reviews.body: LOVE this shower filter! I have been using the Filterbaby Pro Series Shower FIlter for a few days now and I can already see a difference! I never thought there was actually a problem with my shower water until I started using this filter. My skin feels cleaner, softer, and less irritated after washing, and my hair feels softer and healthier overall. Installation for this filter was also super simple! If you’re looking to elevate your skin and hair care, this filter is definitely worth it!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 9 March 2026
